problem_text: Our company is experiencing slow query performance in our customer database, which has over a million records. I need you to analyze the current indexing strategy and propose an optimized solution to improve the query response time. Please design a new indexing approach that you believe would resolve this issue, and provide a detailed explanation of your rationale. Additionally, include the potential impact on write operations and any considerations for data integrity. Your final output should be a report outlining your proposed indexing strategy, expected performance improvements, and any trade-offs involved.
internal_gaps: The specifics of the current indexing strategy are not provided.
The types of queries that are underperforming are not specified.
There is no information on the database management system (DBMS) in use.
